name: Brave Search API
what_it_does: Independent web search API powered by Brave's own index (not Google or Bing) with strong privacy guarantees, a summarizer endpoint, and support for web, news, image, and video search.
use_cases: General web search for agents needing current information without Google/Bing dependencies
Privacy-preserving search where user data must not be sent to major ad networks
Retrieving AI-generated summaries of search results via the Summarizer endpoint
News, image, and video search from a single API provider
Building search-augmented agents with a fresh, independent web index
not_for: Semantic or neural search (Brave uses traditional keyword/relevance ranking)
Full-page content extraction (returns snippets, not full text)
Applications requiring Google-scale index coverage in long-tail queries
best_when: An agent needs broad, current web search results from an independent index with good privacy properties and built-in summarization.
avoid_when: You need semantic similarity search, full-text page content, or guaranteed Google-parity result depth on obscure queries.

auth.notes: API key passed via the X-Subscription-Token request header. Keys are available immediately after subscription with no additional verification.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 2,000 queries/month free on the Data for AI plan
pricing.paid_tiers: From $3 per 1,000 queries (Base plan); Pro plan with higher rate limits available
pricing.notes: The Summarizer endpoint costs additional quota units. Free tier is generous for prototyping agent tools.

performance.rate_limits: Free tier: 1 req/s; paid tiers: up to 20 req/s

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard HTTP error codes with JSON bodies. Rate limit responses include X-RateLimit headers. Errors are generally actionable.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only search API; all endpoints are inherently idempotent and safe to retry.
known_agent_gotchas: No official SDK; agents must implement HTTP calls directly or use community wrappers
Summarizer endpoint requires a separate API call and is not available on all plans
Result freshness for breaking news can lag by several hours compared to Google
Country and language filtering options differ from Google; test locale-specific queries carefully
Rate limits are strict on free tier; bursting even a few requests over the limit triggers 429 errors

security_score_components.security_notes: Privacy-first architecture; Brave does not log identifying user information by design. Single API key with no scope granularity. TLS enforced.
